raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 28,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Irrag tchs Wihr̄s Ra-
nijus weena nizzinajama iskaifti-
ta Elka Bilde? jeb irr wiꞥſch
weens Tranks/ kas neweenam
patihk? Raphz irr wiꞥſch un
winna Dsimumms atmesti wee-
ná Semmê/ ko tee ne pasihſt?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 29,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ak Semme! Semme!
Semme! klaust ta KUNGA
Wahrdu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 30,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ta fakka tas KUNGS:
Uhſrakſit scho Wihrn par Ne-
auglign/ weenn Wihrn/ kam
fawu Muhſchu labbi ne isdoh-
fees. Jo neweenam no winna
Dsimumma labbi fiahfees/ kas
fehdeht warretu us Dahwida
Gohda-Krehlu/ un wairs eekſch
Juhta walduht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ta XXIII. Nodalla.
Jeremijus draude teem wiltigeem Prauee-
scheem bahrgas Gohdibas: i/etc. Apfoh-
la/ Ta teem Atlikkuscheem sawu Kauchu/buhs
pee ta Meſſijaja Walstibas pee.aizinateem
ſtuht: z/etc.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Aj jums juhs Ganni!
kas juhs mannas Gan-
nibas Awis nomaita-
jat/ un iskaifat/ fakka tas
KUNGS.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tadeht ta fakka tas
KUNGS/ tas Israëta Deew̄/
no teem Sanneem/ kas mannas
Landis ganna: Juhs effat man-
nas Awis iskaitijschi/ un effat
tahs tedſinnufscht/ un ne effet
tahs peemeklejſcht. Rangt/ Es
peemekleſchu juhs juhſo faunu
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Darbu deht/ fakka tas KUNGS.
3. Un es fapulzinatchu pats
mannas atliffuschas Awis no
wiﬀahm Semnehin/ furp es J
tahs etmu isdsinnis/ un atwed-
dischu tahs atkat uhs fawuem
Laſdareem/ un tahs buhs augli-
gas un wairoſees.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un es eezelfchu pabr teem
Gannus/ kas tohs gannihs/ un
tahs ne bihſees wairs/ nedſ taps
behdinatas/ nedſ peemekletas/
fakka tas KUNGS.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Rangi/ tahs Deenas
nahks/ fakka tas KUNGS: Ra
es tam Dahwidam weenu taiſ-
nu Sarru uszelfchn/ un taſwal-
dihs weens kehninsch buhdams/
un winnam labbi isdohfees/ un
Wiꞥſch darrihs Teefu un Taiſ-
nibu wirs Semmes.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Winna Laika tap̄ Juhda
atpestita/ un Israëls dsihwohs
drohtchi. Un tas buhs winna
Wahrde/ ar ko wiꞥſch taps no-
tanfts/ tas KUNGS nuhfa
Taiſniba.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tapehz raugi/ tahs Dee-
nas nahks/ fakka tas KUNGS:
Ra tee wairs ne fazzihs: Tik tee-
ſcham ka tas KUNGS dsihwo/
kas tohs Israëta Behrnus irr
isweddis no Egiptes-Semmes:
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet tik teescham ka tas
KUNGS dsihwo/ kas to Dsim-
munu ta Israëta Namma irr
isweddis/ un irr to atweddis
no tahs Semmes prett Seemeta-
Pust/ un no wiﬀahm Sein-
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
